steps.title: Identify the key contrast in the study
steps.content: The passage contrasts two groups: people doing hard tasks first “became more skilled and productive workers over time,” while those doing easy tasks first did not gain this benefit. The blank asks what easy-first people were less of—so I need a word for a quality the productive, hard-first group would have more of.

steps.title: Select the word that matches the quality
steps.content: Efficient directly expresses the missing quality—efficient workers are productive and effective, matching the hard-first group's outcome. Secretive, outgoing, and unsympathetic have no connection to work productivity or task performance. That matches choice B — B is correct.
